Vaadin UI kit vendor notices

This bundle is generated from npm packages used by @vaadin/combo-box.
Keep package-lock.json and this notice file in sync by running npm run build:ui-kit.

- @lit-labs/ssr-dom-shim@1.6.0: BSD-3-Clause
- @lit/reactive-element@2.1.2: BSD-3-Clause
- @open-wc/dedupe-mixin@1.4.0: MIT
- @polymer/polymer@3.5.2: BSD-3-Clause
- @vaadin/a11y-base@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/combo-box@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/component-base@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/field-base@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/input-container@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/item@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/lit-renderer@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/overlay@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/vaadin-lumo-styles@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/vaadin-material-styles@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- @vaadin/vaadin-themable-mixin@24.9.16: Apache-2.0
- lit@3.3.3: BSD-3-Clause
- lit-element@4.2.2: BSD-3-Clause
- lit-html@3.3.3: BSD-3-Clause
